mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.name, r.url, r.method, r.description, r.created_at, creator.username AS creator, r.updated_at, COALESCE(updater.username, 'Unknown') AS updater FROM sys_resource r LEFT JOIN sys_user creator ON r.created_by = creator.id LEFT JOIN sys_user updater ON r.updated_by = updater.id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
SELECT r.id, r.name, r.url, r.method, r.description, rr.resource_id IS NOT NULL AS checked FROM sys_resource r LEFT JOIN sys_role_resource rr ON rr.resource_id = r.id AND rr.role_id = #{roleId}
